cbd.title: Discover our Organic CBD
cbd.subtitle: Carefully grown on our organic farm, our CBD is 100% natural and meets the highest quality standards.
cbd.naturalDesc: Grown organically, without pesticides or chemicals.
cbd.certifiedQualityDesc: Regular testing and organic certification guarantee the quality of our products.
cbd.localProductionDesc: From field to table, we control the entire production chain.
cbd.whatIsCbdAnswer: CBD (Cannabidiol) is a natural cannabinoid extracted from hemp. Unlike THC, it has no psychoactive effects and is fully legal in France.
cbd.legalAnswer: Yes, all our products are 100% legal in France. They contain less than 0.2% THC, in accordance with current legislation.
cbd.howToChoose: How to choose my CBD product?
cbd.howToChooseAnswer: The choice depends on your preferences and needs. We offer oils for gradual effect, flowers for infusion use, and derivatives for more specific uses.
cbd.ctaTitle: Ready to discover our CBD products?
cbd.ctaSubtitle: Explore our range of organic and local CBD products

baskets.title: Vegetable baskets
baskets.subtitle: Reserve your weekly basket of fresh, organic, seasonal vegetables harvested at the farm. Once your request is sent, we will confirm it by email with pickup details.
baskets.noBaskets: No baskets available right now. Come back soon!
baskets.reservationSent: Reservation sent — you will receive a confirmation email.
baskets.routeBuffer: Service area: {km} km around the route
baskets.cityNotServed: Delivery is not available in {city}. Choose a pickup point or another city.
baskets.noToursForCity: No tours pass through this city.
baskets.cashOnlyNotice: Cash payment only on pickup or handover. No online payment.
baskets.farmPickupHelp: For baskets reserved on the website.
baskets.pickupHelp: Pickup from a partner point depending on availability.
baskets.deliveryTourHelp: Delivery available only in certain towns.
baskets.farmDefaultSlotHelp: Farm pickup for baskets is set by default on the slot below. You can suggest another time if needed. Cash payment on pickup.
baskets.pickupNotice: Choose the most convenient pickup point. Cash payment on pickup.
baskets.deliveryTourNotice: First enter your town to check whether the tour comes to you, then choose your delivery tour. Cash payment on handover.
baskets.alternateSlotRequired: Please provide the preferred date and time for your alternate slot
baskets.cityNotDeliverable: This city is not served by our tours
baskets.selectCityForDelivery: Select your city to access home delivery

reservationManage.title: Manage reservation
reservationManage.seoDescription: Private page to manage a customer reservation.
reservationManage.introSubscription: You can cancel only one week or stop your subscription completely.
reservationManage.introFarm: You can accept a proposed slot, request another one or cancel your reservation.
reservationManage.reservationCancelled: This reservation has already been cancelled.
reservationManage.subscriptionStopped: This subscription has already been stopped.
reservationManage.subscriptionInactive: This subscription is no longer active.
reservationManage.pendingProposal: The farm has proposed a slot. Please accept it or suggest another date and time.
reservationManage.toastCancelSuccess: Your request has been processed successfully
reservationManage.toastStopSuccess: Your subscription has been stopped successfully
reservationManage.toastOccurrenceSuccess: This week has been cancelled successfully
reservationManage.toastAcceptSuccess: The slot has been confirmed successfully
reservationManage.toastCounterProposalSuccess: Your counter-proposal has been sent successfully

ordersPage.counterProposalHelp: The customer will receive an email to accept this slot or propose another one.
ordersPage.calendarSyncHelp: If a Google calendar is selected in settings and a date is provided, the confirmed order will be added automatically.
ordersPage.cancellationReasonLabel: Reason shown in the cancellation email
ordersPage.confirmArchive: Archive this order to remove it from the list?

settingsGlobalPage.title: Global
settingsGlobalPage.description: Site identity, favicon, public contact details and opening hours.
settingsGlobalPage.identityDescription: Logo, favicon and main site texts.
settingsGlobalPage.contactDescription: These details can be reused in the footer and public pages.
settingsGlobalPage.openingDescription: Reference used in the footer and pages that inject opening hours.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies and consent
cookieConsent.description: Configure the public cookie banner and the declared inventory of cookies and browser storage.

settingsFeaturesPage.title: Features
settingsFeaturesPage.description: Enable public options and the ordering window.

settingsSiteTemplatePage.title: Site template
settingsSiteTemplatePage.description: Pick a single template, apply it to the current site, and use the same panel to create or update its registry version.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.warning: Warning: applying a template replaces navigation, the home page, the contact page, the base layout and the theme settings linked to that template.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.selectionHelp: Use one selection to preview, apply, or sync a template.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.templateApplyError: Unable to apply the site template
settingsSiteTemplatePage.registryAuto: The instance is registered automatically when the registry is configured.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.localTemplatesHelp: This list comes from the configured registry. The simple local fallback appears only as a last resort when no remote template is available.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.remoteTemplatesHelp: Remote templates are versioned and shareable across instances.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.registryUnavailableHelp: Add `CMS_REGISTRY_URL`, `CMS_REGISTRY_API_KEY`, and `CMS_INSTANCE_SLUG` in the host to enable the registry.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.cannotEditSystem: This system template is read-only on this instance. Only authorized instances can update it.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.replaceBrandAssetsHelp: By default, the instance visual identity is preserved. Enable this option to also restore the logo and favicon defined by the template.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.replaceBrandAssetsConfirm: The current logo and favicon will be replaced with the template defaults.
settingsSiteTemplatePage.discardDraftConfirm: Delete the current draft and restore the last published state?
settingsSiteTemplatePage.deleteConfirm: Delete this template from the registry?
settingsSiteTemplatePage.draftDiscarded: Draft removed, restored to published state
settingsSiteTemplatePage.remoteTemplateError: Error while syncing the remote template

settingsUpdatesPage.title: Updates
settingsUpdatesPage.description: Inspect releases from the registry and trigger their deployment through the integrated local update runtime.
settingsUpdatesPage.updatesDisabledDevelopment: This instance is running in development mode. Integrated deployments are disabled to avoid overwriting your working environment.
settingsUpdatesPage.updatesDisabledCloudflare: This instance is running on Cloudflare runtime. Integrated deployments are disabled here: update the source repository and redeploy the application instead.
settingsUpdatesPage.manualUpdateStepPull: 1. Pull the latest code from the source repository.
settingsUpdatesPage.manualUpdateStepMigrate: 3. Apply migrations before restarting or redeploying.
settingsUpdatesPage.manualUpdateStepRestart: 4. Then restart or redeploy the instance.
settingsUpdatesPage.currentReleaseHint: This release is already active on this instance.
settingsUpdatesPage.deployUpgradeHint: Standard update to a newer version.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackChoiceHint: This fallback version can be applied as a fast or full rollback.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackFastOnlyHint: This version can only be reapplied as a fast rollback.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackFullOnlyHint: This version can only be restored with the full database backup.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackNeedsMatchingBackup: Deployment disabled: no usable backup is associated with this older version.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackUnavailable: No usable rollback is available for this version.
settingsUpdatesPage.deployError: Unable to start or monitor deployment
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackPerformed: The update failed and a rollback was applied.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackHelpFast: Fast rollback only switches code, without restoring the database, and is allowed only when the schema is compatible with the target version.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackFullAvailableWithBackup: Full rollback available with the backup from {date}.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackFullWarning: Full rollback also restores the database backup created before the update. Any data added afterwards will be lost.
settingsUpdatesPage.rollbackFullConfirm: Confirm full rollback? The database will be restored from the backup created before the update and any data added since then will be lost.
settingsUpdatesPage.confirmDeployDescription: Current version {current} will be replaced by {target}. A database backup will be prepared before deployment when needed.
settingsUpdatesPage.confirmRollbackDescription: You are about to go back from {current} to {target}. Choose a fast rollback if the schema is already compatible, or a full rollback if the saved database must also be restored.
settingsUpdatesPage.overlayDeploying: The site is preparing the switch to the new version. Do not close this page.
settingsUpdatesPage.overlayReconnect: The service is restarting. This page will reload automatically as soon as it becomes available again.
settingsUpdatesPage.noRegistryJobs: No jobs synced to the registry.

emailConnectorsPage.title: Emails and connectors
emailConnectorsPage.googleDescription: The Google connection is used to send confirmation emails and sync confirmed orders into Google Calendar.
emailConnectorsPage.notConnected: No Google account connected. Emails and Google calendar sync are disabled.
emailConnectorsPage.noCalendarSync: Do not sync with Google Calendar
emailConnectorsPage.calendarHelp: New confirmed orders will be added to this calendar.
emailConnectorsPage.emailsDescription: Define the addresses used by the site, then choose the primary provider and the fallback provider.
emailConnectorsPage.gmailSenderHelp: Example: site name followed by its Gmail address.
emailConnectorsPage.resendSenderHelp: Test example: site name followed by its Resend address.
emailConnectorsPage.fallbackWarning: If the primary and secondary providers are identical, no fallback will be possible.
emailConnectorsPage.templatesDescription: The template list is loaded once. Detailed content is only fetched when a template is opened.
emailConnectorsPage.subject: Subject
emailConnectorsPage.selectTemplate: Select a template in the list to load its content.

customizationBasketsPage.title: Basket customization
customizationBasketsPage.description: Adjust the rendering of the basket list and cards.
customizationBasketsPage.previewDescription: Real rendering of the baskets component with your settings.

customizationNewsPage.title: News customization
customizationNewsPage.description: Adjust the rendering of the news list and article cards.
customizationNewsPage.previewDescription: Real rendering of the news list with your settings.

customizationNavigationPage.title: Navigation
customizationNavigationPage.description: Build the main public menu and footer menu.
customizationNavigationPage.headerPreviewDescription: Active links in the main menu.
customizationNavigationPage.footerPreviewDescription: Active links in the footer menu.
customizationNavigationPage.visibleDescription: The link is rendered on the public site.
customizationNavigationPage.newTabDescription: For external links or specific needs.

customizationLayoutPage.title: Layout
customizationLayoutPage.description: Header and footer settings with live preview and a footer fully composable with blocks.
customizationLayoutPage.headerDescription: Logo, dimensions, menu and colors of the public header.
customizationLayoutPage.showSiteNameHelp: Displays the name next to the logo.
customizationLayoutPage.showSiteTaglineHelp: Adds a secondary line under the site name.
customizationLayoutPage.showPrimaryNavigationHelp: Uses the links configured in the Navigation page.
customizationLayoutPage.stickyHeaderHelp: Keeps the header visible at the top while scrolling.
customizationLayoutPage.socialLinksDescription: Can be injected anywhere in the footer.
customizationLayoutPage.footerDescription: Colors and block-by-block composition of each column.

themesPage.title: Themes
themesPage.description: DaisyUI theme management base. This page generates CSS variables like the theme generator and also controls exposure to the theme controller.
themesPage.enableControllerHelp: Exposes allowed themes in the public selector and also generates the related CSS selector.
themesPage.editDescription: Edit the theme and generate CSS variables.
themesPage.themeActiveHelp: Generates CSS variables and can be applied on the site.
themesPage.showInControllerHelp: Controls appearance in the public selector and the related CSS selector for the theme controller.
themesPage.defaultThemeHelp: Theme loaded when no choice is saved locally.
themesPage.generatedCssDescription: Direct preview of the CSS block injected for this theme, with or without the `theme-controller` selector.

pageEditorPage.title: Page editing
pageEditorPage.description: CMS structure, SEO metadata and page rendering.
pageEditorPage.contentDescription: Block-based page editor, with direct preview on the active translation.
pageEditorPage.previewLanguage: Real page rendering for the {locale} language.
pageEditorPage.componentPageDescription: This page will use the {component} component. Full wiring will be done during business integration.

cookieBanner.essentialHelp: Always active for the proper operation of the site.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie policy
cookiesPage.intro: This page lists the cookies, browser storage and scripts that the site may use based on the configuration enabled in the admin area. Essential services are listed here even when they are not subject to consent.

categoryDescriptions.essential: Required for site operation, security, language handling or minimal technical persistence.
categoryDescriptions.preferences: Used to remember some display or user comfort preferences.
categoryDescriptions.thirdParty: Enable external integrations that may load scripts or set their own cookies.
categoryDescriptions.marketing: Used for measurement, tracking or marketing purposes when enabled.

construction.title: Our website is coming soon
construction.subtitle: This site's content is currently being prepared.
features: reservations or orders if they are enabled,
as well as the latest news.
construction.footer: Thank you for your patience and see you soon

install.title: Configure your CMS
install.subtitle: Create the first administrator, detect the current execution context, and prepare the project without editing files by hand.
install.siteSectionHelp: This information is used as the generated project baseline.
install.languageSectionHelp: This language will be used when the project starts.
install.localeFrHelp: Default interface and content in French.
install.localeEnHelp: Default interface and content in English.
install.templateSectionHelp: Choose a starting point for CMS content and settings. You can still change everything later from the admin.
install.platformSectionHelp: Choose the data stack to use. The real runtime is detected automatically.
install.stackServerHelp: Use this for a classic Node instance or a packaged runtime.
install.stackCloudflareHelp: Use this for a Cloudflare source project or an already deployed Cloudflare instance.
install.adminSectionHelp: This account immediately gets full back-office access.
install.detectedRuntimeServerHelp: This instance is currently running in a classic Node runtime. You can finish immediately with SQLite, or prepare a future Cloudflare deployment if a Wrangler starter is present.
install.detectedRuntimeServerWithCloudflareHelp: This instance is currently running in Node, but a Cloudflare starter was detected at the project root. You can therefore prepare D1 + R2 and then restart on the intended Cloudflare runtime.
install.detectedRuntimeCloudflareHelp: This instance is already running in a Cloudflare runtime with bindings. The installation must therefore stay on D1 + R2.
whatHappens: It saves an automatically generated project configuration.
In SQLite mode, it creates the local database and applies migrations if needed.
It creates the first administrator and prepares the project for the actual target runtime.
install.restartHintBody: If you change the data stack, the configuration is saved but will only be fully applied after the next coherent restart or deployment.
